deploy.startCommand: python -c "import django, os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','server.settings'); django.setup(); print('Django startup OK')" && gunicorn server.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} --workers 2 --threads 2 --timeout 120 --log-level info --access-logfile - --error-logfile -
